name: Anish-Nah-be Pakwejigan (Real Indian Bread)
recipeInstructions:
1. Let the soft bread dough cool to room temperature.
2. Mix in the blueberries and put the dough into a bowl.
3. Chill until it thickens.
4. When the dough is firm, cut it into 1/2-inch slices.
5. Fry until they are golden brown.
6. Serve hot with maple syrup.
